name: Steve's Spicy Yogurt Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Put yogurt in a medium-sized bowl.
2. Add lemon juice, mustard, horseradish, soy sauce, garlic, and Worcestershire sauce to the yogurt mixture. Mix thoroughly.
3. Place breadcrumbs in a separate bowl. Add garam masala, thyme, salt, and pepper to taste. Mix thoroughly.
4. Rinse chicken breasts and pat dry.
5. Dip each breast first into the yogurt mixture, covering top and bottom.
6. Roll each piece in breadcrumbs, coating the chicken.
7. Place chicken in a baking pan, meaty side up.
8. Bake for 45-50 minutes at 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
9. Serves 4.
